notes: Adds an opt-in static MIPSLE C read backend with a verified shell fallback; all mutations and VPN control remain in the established shell implementation
Keeps the native process loopback-only, single-threaded and cache-only, with no shell execution, outbound network access or VPN mutation capability
Adds fail-closed activation, immediate status-cache synchronization, startup and runtime memory guards, health monitoring and automatic shell recovery
Measured on Viva KN-1910 at 304-384 KiB RSS with one thread, while preserving more than 24 MiB of available memory under the tested workload
Verified forced native-daemon outage, cache expiry, 100-request benchmark, semantic parity and an unchanged active VLESS route
Keeps both rollback tiers ready: embedded 2026.07.14.2-demand-snapshot and reversible previous application 2026.07.15.9-native-c
Includes BusyBox syntax, cache-flow, native-memory, API safety, rollback, desktop and mobile Playwright regression checks
